message:
feat: display mnemonic names in sidebar, thread header, delegation cards, and conversation view

- Update buildNameMap to format 'Mnemonic (agentName)' when mnemonic exists
- Show mnemonic names in AgentTree sidebar node labels
- Show mnemonic names in ThreadPanel header
- Add mnemonicName prop to DelegationBlock and display it
- Pass mnemonic_name from event data to DelegationBlock in EventLine
- Add tests for buildNameMap mnemonic formatting

files.patch:
@@ -723,6 +723,7 @@ export async function runCli(command: CliCommand): Promise<void> {
 		sessionId,
 		initialHistory: resumeState?.history,
 		completedHandles: resumeState?.completedHandles,
+		usedMnemonicNames: resumeState?.usedMnemonicNames,
 		infra,
 		logStderr: command.logStderr,
 		debug: command.debug,

@@ -164,7 +164,9 @@ function TreeNode({ {statusIcon(node.status)} - {node.agentName} + + {node.mnemonicName ? `${node.mnemonicName} (${node.agentName})` : node.agentName} + {node.agentId.slice(0, 8)} {node.durationMs != null && node.status !== "running" && (
